meta.title: Sleep Animal Quiz | What's Your Chronotype? - DopaBrain
meta.description: Discover your sleep chronotype with 10 questions. Are you a Bear, Lion, Wolf, or Dolphin? Get your ideal sleep schedule and productivity tips!

intro.desc: Answer 10 questions to discover your sleep chronotype. Get your ideal sleep schedule, productivity windows, and personalized tips!
intro.disclaimer: This quiz is for entertainment purposes only and is not a medical diagnosis.

q1.text: What time do you naturally feel sleepy?

q2.text: Without an alarm, what time do you wake up?
q2.d: Wake up multiple times, drift back

q3.text: When do you feel most energized during the day?

q4.text: If you had an important exam or presentation, when would you prepare?
q4.b: Wake up early and get it done
q4.c: Late at night with deep focus
q4.d: Last minute in one intense burst

q5.text: How would you spend a free weekend?
q5.c: Sleep in, go out at night
q5.d: No plans, go with the mood

q6.text: How would you describe your sleep quality?
q6.b: Fall asleep fast, wake up refreshed

q8.text: When do you usually drink caffeine?

q9.text: In a group project, what's your role?

q10.text: Which statement resonates with you most?
q10.a: A regular routine is the foundation of health
q10.b: The early bird catches the worm
q10.c: The deeper the night, the brighter the ideas

results.percentage: About {pct}% of people share this type

bear.name: Bear
bear.description: You follow the solar cycle naturally. With a steady and consistent rhythm, you're most productive mid-morning. Social, reliable, and a great team player — people trust you instinctively.
sleepTips: Go to bed and wake up at the same time daily
Reduce screen time 2 hours before bed

lion.name: Lion
lion.description: You're the king of mornings! Bursting with energy from dawn, you hit peak productivity before noon. Goal-oriented and optimistic, you're a natural leader. Early to bed, early to rise is your mantra.

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.description: You're a creative night owl who comes alive after sunset! Your energy and creativity peak in the evening hours. You think outside the box and march to your own beat. Mornings are tough, but nights are your kingdom.
sleepTips: Get bright light exposure in the morning
Try to be in bed by midnight
Take a light walk after dinner
Cold shower in the morning to wake up

dolphin.name: Dolphin
dolphin.description: You're a light sleeper with a brilliant mind. Perfectionist by nature, your brain is always buzzing. Your sleep patterns may be irregular, but when you lock in, you produce extraordinary results.
sleepTips: Write a worry journal before bed

share.title: Share
share.twitterText: My sleep animal is {animal}{emoji}! Only {pct}% of people are this type 🌙
